maay_maay.welcome_to_the_art_design_studio: 🎨 Ku soo dhawoow Istuudiyaha Farshaxanka & Naqshadeynta!
maay_maay.explore_15_interactive_tools_that_teac: Baadh 15 qalab oo firfircoon oo ku bara aragtida midabka, farshaxanka xisaabeed, naqshad iskeed u dhisanta, iyo muuqaal cid walba u fudud. Tab kasta waa goob abuur oo kala duwan. Waa kuwan waxa aad samayn karto:
maay_maay.explore_hsl_color_space_interactively: Baadh booska midabka HSL adigoo gacanta ku haya
maay_maay.mix_paints_with_subtractive_color_theo: Isku dar rinjiga adigoo raacaya aragtida midabka ee wax laga jaro (subtractive)
maay_maay.create_pixel_art_on_a_grid_canvas: Ku samee farshaxan pixel dul shabag
maay_maay.draw_with_rotational_reflective_symmet: Sawir adigoo isticmaalaya isku-ekaansho wareeg iyo mid muraayadeed
maay_maay.flow_fields_particles_starfields_auror: Goobo socod, walxo yaryar (particles), goobo xiddigo, aurora
maay_maay.virtual_spin_painting_with_physics: Rinji wareegsan oo raacaya sharciyada fiisikiska
maay_maay.geometric_string_patterns_on_pegs: Qaabab xarig oo joomatari ah oo musmaarro dul yaal
maay_maay.repeating_tile_patterns_like_m_c_esche: Qaabab tiles ah oo isku celcelinaya sida M.C. Escher
maay_maay.design_and_export_css_gradient_pattern: Naqshadee oo soo saar qaabab gradient oo CSS
maay_maay.harmony_desc: Baadh codadka isku raacsan iyo kuwa is diida, ku xir saamiyada frequency qaabka, oo u rog xiriirka muusigga mid muuqaal ah
maay_maay.wcag_contrast_checker_for_accessibilit: Hubiyaha kala-duwanaanta midabka ee WCAG si loo fududeeyo helitaanka
maay_maay.color_theory_additive_vs_subtractive_m: Aragtida midabka (isku-dar lagu daro iyo mid laga jaro, midabbo is dhaafsan, HSL/RGB), xariiqyo qalloocan oo xisaabeed (hypotrochoids, Lissajous), fractals iyo is-ekaanshaha, joomatariga tessellation, sida indhuhu wax u arkaan ee op art, heerarka helitaanka WCAG, iyo farshaxan kombiyuutar. Qalab kasta wuxuu ku baraa xisaabta quruxda ka danbeysa.
maay_maay.color_wheel_hsl_hsv_complementary_pair: Giraangirta Midabka — HSL/HSV + lammaane is dhaafsan
maay_maay.hue_0_360_around_the_wheel_saturation_: Hue (0-360 giraangirta ku wareegsan), saturation (saafinta midabka), lightness (iftiinka). Kuwa is dhaafsan waa kuwa ka soo horjeeda, kuwa is dhow waa deriska, kuwa triadic waa 120° kala fog. Newton ayaa 1666 midabbada giraangir dul dhigay.
maay_maay.color_mixer_subtractive_vs_additive: Isku-darka Midabka — laga jaro iyo lagu daro
maay_maay.paint_and_print_subtractive_cmy_mixes_: Rinjiga iyo daabacaadda = laga jaro (CMY isku darkoodu wuxuu noqdaa madow); iftiinka iyo shaashadaha = lagu daro (RGB isku darkoodu wuxuu noqdaa cad). Adduun isku mid ah, laakiin xisaab gebi ahaanba kala duwan — daabacadu waxay ku fikirtaa plates K, telefishanku wuxuu ku fikiraa Hz.
maay_maay.pixel_art_bitmap_craft_at_8_8_to_32_32: Farshaxan Pixel — farsamada bitmap ee 8×8 ilaa 32×32
maay_maay.each_pixel_is_a_deliberate_decision_ne: Pixel kastaa waa go'aan la damacsan yahay. Sprites-ka NES waxay geesi ku qaadeen 8-nil 16×16 iyagoo isticmaalaya afar midab oo keliya. Algorithm-ka xariiqda ee Bresenham wuxuu sawiraa xariiq dhinac u jeeda isagoo aan tirooyin jajab ah isticmaalin.
maay_maay.bilateral_mirror_rotational_n_fold_poi: Labo dhinac (muraayad), wareeg (n-fold), iyo barta. 17-ka koox ee wallpaper waxay kala saaraan qaab kasta oo laba-cabbir ah oo isku celcelin leh — kaas oo ah shaqada Escher oo dhan.
maay_maay.a_small_circle_rolls_inside_a_big_one_: Goobo yar ayaa mid weyn gudihiis ku giringiraysa, qalinkuna wuxuu ka fogyahay bartamaha. Saamiga labada radius ayaa go'aamiya tirada ubaxyada; fogaanta qalinkuna waxay go'aamisaa dhumucda. Waxaa la naqshadeeyay 1965, laakiin xisaabtu waxay ka timid 1700-meeyadii.
maay_maay.generative_algorithm_randomness_as_art: Abuur — algorithm + kala-baxsad oo farshaxame ah
maay_maay.sol_lewitt_wrote_instructions_the_wall: Sol LeWitt wuxuu qoray tilmaamo keliya; ninkii derbiga ku shaqeeyay ayaa fuliyay. Maanta: Processing, p5.js, Cinder. “Farshaxamuhu waa xeerka, ma aha natiijada.”
maay_maay.drop_paint_spin_watch_it_fling_outward: Rinji ku shub, wareeji, oo daawo sida uu dibadda ugu firdho wareegyo. Damien Hirst wuxuu malaayiin ka kasbaday iibinta sawirrada wareegga. Isla fiisikiska ka jira mashiinka ansalaatada; F = mω²r.
maay_maay.string_art_curves_from_straight_lines: Farshaxan Xarig — xariiqyo qalloocan oo ka yimid kuwo toosan
maay_maay.connect_every_n_th_nail_an_envelope_cu: Isku xir musmaar kasta oo N-aad ah; xariiq envelope ah ayaa soo baxaysa. Mary Everest Boole ayaa 1900 fasalka xisaabta ku soo bandhigtay. Cardioid-ka xariiqyada toosan ka samaysan wali indhaha wuu jiitaa.
maay_maay.bridget_riley_s_moir_fields_vasarely_s: Goobooyinka moiré ee Bridget Riley, shabagyada Vasarely. Unugyada maskaxda ee dhaqdhaqaaqa ogaada ayaa xad-dhaafay marka kala-duwanaanshuhu si degdeg ah isu beddelo — bogguna wuxuu u muuqdaa mid *ruxmaya*.
maay_maay.every_periodic_2d_tiling_fits_one_of_1: Tiling kasta oo laba-cabbir ah oo isku celcelin leh wuxuu ku dhacaa mid ka mid ah 17 koox oo isku-ekaansho ah. Escher wuxuu tan ogaaday markuu 1936 booqday Alhambra; kadibna 30 sano ayuu ku qaatay inuu dhammaystiro liiska.
maay_maay.mandelbrot_1975_cauliflower_coastlines: Mandelbrot 1975. Kolifluur, xeebaha, xididdada dhiigga, hillaac, sambabbada — dhammaan waa fractal. “Daruuraha ma aha goobooyin, buurahana ma aha koonno, jiliftana ma aha mid siman.”
maay_maay.css_gives_you_linear_radial_and_conic_: CSS wuxuu ku siiyaa gradient linear, radial, iyo conic. Qaansoroobaadka dhabta ahi wuxuu leeyahay midabbo isku xiran (ma jiraan qeybo kala go'an) — “7-da midab ee qaansoroobaadka” waxay ahayd doorasho Newton u sameeyay sabab muusiko awgeed.
maay_maay.stereogram_3d_from_a_flat_page: Stereogram — 3D oo bog siman ka soo baxaya
maay_maay.90s_magic_eye_craze_each_eye_sees_a_sl: Waalidii Magic Eye ee 90-meeyadii. Il kastaa waxay aragtaa sawir yar oo dhaqaaqay; haddaad indhaha si sax ah u isku dhawayso ama u kala fogayso, maskaxdu way isku darsataa oo qoto-dheer bay ka dhigtaa. Ilaa 5% dadka run ahaantii ma arki karaan — ma aha khaladkooda.
maay_maay.wcag_2_1_normal_text_4_5_1_large_3_1_w: WCAG 2.1: qoraal caadi ah 4.5:1, mid weyn 3:1. Sababta kala-duwanaan yari u dhibto dadka aragga daciifka ah, xataa haddii adigu akhrisan kartid. APCA (kii ku xiga WCAG 3.0) wuxuu isticmaalaa iftiinka sida indhuhu u arkaan, ee ma aha saamiga luminance ee cad.
maay_maay.harmony_lab_hint: Isbarbardhig codadka isku raacsan iyo kuwa is diida, ku xir saamiyada frequency qaabka, oo u rog xiriirka muusigga is-waafajin muuqaal ah.
maay_maay.interactive_color_wheel: Giraangir midab oo la isticmaali karo
maay_maay.click_the_wheel_to_pick_a_hue: Ku dhufo giraangirta si aad hue u dooratid
maay_maay.repeats_a_pattern_around_a_central_poi: wuxuu qaab ku celceliyaa barta bartamaha ku wareegsan. Gudaha
maay_maay.starfish_5_fold_snowflakes_6_fold_and_: , xiddig-badeedka (5-fold), baraf-daadka (6-fold), iyo ubaxyadu meel kasta way ka muuqdaan.
maay_maay.tile_patterns_quilts_floor_mosaics: Qaabab tiles, bustayaal tolan, iyo mosaic dhulka la dhigo.
maay_maay.snowflakes_honeycombs_islamic_star_pat: Baraf-daad, guryo shinni, iyo qaabab xiddigeed oo Islaami ah.
maay_maay.mandala_art_rose_windows_in_cathedrals: Farshaxanka mandala, iyo daaqadaha ubaxa ee kaniisadaha waaweyn.
maay_maay.islamic_geometric_art_uses_radial_symm: Farshaxanka joomatariga ee Islaamku si weyn buu u isticmaalaa isku-ekaanshaha wareegga. Guntimaha Celtic, maryaha Navajo, iyo calaamadaha qoysaska Jabbaan (“mon”) dhammaantood waxay ku tiirsan yihiin isku-ekaanshaha wareegga.
maay_maay.uses_bilateral_reflection_symmetry_the: wuxuu isticmaalaa isku-ekaansho laba-dhinac (muraayadeed) — kan wejiyada, balanbaallista, iyo caleemaha laga helo. Waa isku-ekaanshaha ugu badan boqortooyada xayawaanka.
maay_maay.cycles_through_the_color_spectrum_as_y: wuxuu ku wareegaa midabbada dhammaantood markaad sawiraysid, isaga oo iskii u samaynaya mandala u eg gradient.
maay_maay.the_quick_brown_fox_jumps_over_the_laz: Dawacadii dheereyd ee bunniga ahayd waxay ka boodday eeyga caajiska ah
maay_maay.sculpt_failed: Xardhistu ma guulaysan — isku day sharaxaad ka fudud.
maay_maay.sculpt_canvas: Muuqaal horudhac ah oo xardho 3D. Jiid si aad u wareejisid.
maay_maay.sculpt_presets: Ka bilow qaab horay loo diyaariyay
maay_maay.sculpt_gallery_empty: Xardhooyinka la keydiyay halkan ayay ka muuqan doonaan.
maay_maay.maximum_contrast_pop_art_brand_accents: Kala-duwanaan ugu badan. Pop art iyo calaamadaha ganacsiga.
maay_maay.triadic_3_equidistant: 🔺 Triadic (saddex si siman u kala fog)
maay_maay.vibrant_but_balanced_childrens_books_c: Firfircoon laakiin dheelitiran. Buugaagta carruurta iyo majaajilooyinka.
maay_maay.rich_palette_with_two_opposing_pairs: Palette taajir ah oo laba lammaane oo is diida leh.
maay_maay.calm_harmonious_landscape_painting: Deggan, isku raacsan — rinjiyeynta muuqaalka dhulka.
maay_maay.energetic_playful_childrens_design: Xoog badan, ciyaar leh — naqshadda carruurta.
maay_maay.adjust_base_hue_saturation_lightness_v: Habee hue-ga aasaasiga ah, saturation, kala-duwanaanta iftiinka, wareegga, iyo cabbirka palette-ka. Widget-ku wuxuu tusayaa palette is-waafajin oo toos ah, wuxuuna u kala saaraa shan nooc oo is-waafajin ah. Dhibco ma jiraan, jawaab la kashifayo ma jirto — iska bedbeddel oo eeg isku-darka noocee is-waafajin keenaya.
maay_maay.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_w: Malo-awaal (qoraal xor ah — jawaab sax ah ma jirto): Maxaa palette ka dhiga mid is waafaqsan halkii uu ka noqon lahaa mid is diida?
maay_maay.stuck_show_open_prompts_no_answers: 🤔 Waan istaagay — i tus su'aalo furan (jawaabo ma jiraan)
maay_maay.open_prompts_investigate_by_manipulati: Su'aalo furan — baadh adigoo iska bedbeddelaya:
maay_maay.find_the_smallest_palette_that_still_f: Hel palette-ka ugu yar ee wali kuu muuqda mid "dhammaystiran".
maay_maay.real_impressionists_used_analogous_pal: Farshaxamayaashii impressionist-ka waxay isticmaali jireen palette analogous. Maxay taasi u ahayd?
maay_maay.some_color_schemes_have_proper_names_c: Qorshayaal midab qaarkood magacyo gaar ah ayay leeyihiin (complementary, split-complementary, triadic). Raadi magacyadaas oo isku day inaad soo celisid.
maay_maay.high_saturation_many_colors_busy_try_d: Saturation sare + midabbo badan = mashquul. Isku day inaad saturation-ka ku yarayso slider-ka isku-darka — maxaa ku dhacaya "is-waafajinta"?
maay_maay.i_think_i_understand_color_harmony_now: Waxaan u malaynayaa inaan hadda fahmay is-waafajinta midabka — aan erayadeyda ku sharxo
maay_maay.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_hue_s: Erayadaada ku sharax: sidee kala-fogaanta hue, saturation, iyo cabbirka palette-ka u go'aamiyaan "is-waafajinta"?
maay_maay.design_note_discrete_5_state_harmony_m: Xusuusin naqshadeed: calaamad is-waafajin oo shan xaaladood leh; giraangirta SVG waxay tusaysaa meelaha palette-ka; dhibco "palette wanaagsan" ma jiraan — sidaas ayaa loo qorsheeyay.
maay_maay.the_path_traced_by_a_point_on_a_small_: — waa waddada uu bar ku yaal goobo yar sameeyo markay goobo weyn gudaheed ku giringirayso. Qaabku wuxuu ku xiran yahay
maay_maay.greatest_common_divisor_of_the_two_rad: (tirada ugu weyn ee labada qeybiso) ee labada radius. Marka R/r uu yahay saami fudud, ubaxyo yar ayaad heshaa; saamiyo adag waxay abuuraan waddooyin isku dhafan oo aan waligood is celcelin.
maay_maay.click_or_drag_on_the_canvas_to_create_: 👆 Ku dhufo ama ku jiid goobta si aad u abuurtid qarax walxo yaryar
maay_maay.click_and_drag_to_drip_paint_on_the_sp: 👆 Ku dhufo oo jiid si aad rinji ugu shubtid goobta wareegaysa
maay_maay.in_a_spinning_reference_frame_objects_: Goob wareegaysa gudaheed, walxuhu waxay dareemaan xoog dibadda u riixaya oo la mid ah fogaantooda bartamaha iyo xawliga wareegga oo laba jibbaaran (ω²r).
maay_maay.real_spin_art_uses_centripetal_acceler: Farshaxanka wareegga ee dhabta ahi wuxuu isticmaalaa dardargelinta bartame-u-jiidashada si uu rinjiga u faafiyo. Rinjiga khafiifka ahi si dhaqso ah buu dibadda ugu duulaa; kan qaro weyni wuxuu abuuraa raadad gaaban oo si fiican loo xakameeyay.
maay_maay.the_combination_of_rotational_motion_a: Isku darka dhaqdhaqaaqa wareegga iyo qaro-weynida rinjigu wuxuu iskii u abuuraa wareegyo iyo qaabab isku dhac ah. Laba sawir oo wareeg ah waligood isku mid ma noqdaan — waa nooc ka mid ah
maay_maay.from_straight_lines_with_a_circle_and_: oo ka yimid xariiqyo toosan. Goobo iyo ku-dhufasho 2, waxaad helaysaa
maay_maay.the_heart_shaped_curve_seen_in_coffee_: — xariiqda qaab-wadne leh ee lagu arko koobabka kafeega. Ku-dhufasho 3 waxay samaysaa
maay_maay.higher_multipliers_create_intricate_pa: . Ku-dhufasho ka sarreysa waxay abuurtaa qaabab isku dhafan oo uu maamulo
maay_maay.nail_n_connects_to_nail_n_m_mod_total: : musmaarka N wuxuu ku xirmaa musmaarka (N × M) mod wadarta.
maay_maay.optical_art_emerged_in_the_1960s_pione: (Optical Art) wuxuu soo baxay 1960-meeyadii, waxaana hormuud u ahaa
maay_maay.it_exploits_the_mechanics_of_human_vis: . Wuxuu ka faa'iidaystaa sida aragga aadanuhu u shaqeeyo si uu dul sameeyo dusha siman khiyaano dhaqdhaqaaq, ruxrux, iyo qoto-dheeri ah.
maay_maay.appear_when_two_regular_grids_overlap_: waxay soo baxaan marka laba shabag oo joogto ah is dul saaraan xoogaa leexsan. Maskaxdaadu ma kala saari karto qaabab is diida, waxayna abuurtaa xariiqyo iyo mowjado aan jirin. Isla saamayntan ayaa ka dhalisa dhalaal maryaha qaarkood.
maay_maay.occur_when_highly_saturated_complement: waxay dhacaan marka midabbo is dhaafsan oo saturation sare leh dhinac ku wada yaalliin. Unugyada midabka ee ishaadu way tartamaan, waxayna abuuraan geeso guuxaya oo aan degganayn — tan waxaa la yiraahdaa
maay_maay.in_the_retina_are_the_main_perceptual_: ee ku jira retina-da ayaa ah habka ugu weyn ee arag. Qaabab wareegyo isku xeeran waxay kiciyaan indho-dhaqdhaqaaq aan la damacsanayn, taasoo ka dhigaysa farshaxanka mid u eg mid neefsanaya oo garaacaya.
maay_maay.or_tiling_covers_a_plane_with_shapes_t: (ama tiling) wuxuu bannaan ku daboolaa qaabab isku haga oo aan god ama is dul-saarid ka dhalin. Saddex polygon oo joogto ah oo keliya ayaa keligood dabooli kara:
maay_maay.1898_1972_transformed_simple_tilings_i: (1898–1972) wuxuu tiling fudud u beddelay farshaxan isagoo qalloociyay geesaha tiles-ka. Farsamadiisu waxay ahayd: qalloocji dhinac ka mid ah qaabka, ka dibna isla qalloocinta ku koobbi dhinaca ka soo horjeeda, si tiles-ku wali si buuxda isugu haggaamaan. Tan ayaa ah aasaaska
maay_maay.uses_tessellations_extensively_combini: si weyn buu u isticmaalaa tessellation — isagoo isku darsanaya xiddigo, lixgeesle, iyo qaabab isku xiran oo laga arko masaajidyada sida Alhambra. Qaababkani waxay raacaan xeerar xisaabeed adag, laakiin waxay abuuraan qurux muuqaal oo yaab leh.
maay_maay.tessellations_use_three_key_operations: Tessellation-ku wuxuu isticmaalaa saddex hawlood oo muhiim ah —
maay_maay.flip_every_tessellation_can_be_classif: (rogid). Tessellation kasta waxaa lagu kala saari karaa midkee ka mid ah 17-ka 'koox wallpaper'.
maay_maay.click_tiles_to_cycle_their_colors: 👆 Ku dhufo tiles-ka si aad midabbadooda u beddeshid
maay_maay.is_generated_by_iterating_z_z_c_for_ev: waxaa lagu abuuraa celcelinta z = z² + c bar kasta oo c ah oo ku jira bannaanka complex. Barta ay |z| xadidan tahay (marnaba ma dhaafto 2) waa 'gudaha' set-ka. Xuduudkuna wuxuu muujiyaa
maay_maay.use_the_same_formula_but_fix_c_and_var: waxay isticmaalaan isla formula-da laakiin c way hagaajiyaan, z-ga bilowga ahna way beddelaan. Bar kasta oo Mandelbrot ah waxay abuurtaa Julia set gaar ah — barta gudaha Mandelbrot waxay abuurtaa Julia isku xiran; barta dibadda waxay abuurtaa 'Fatou sets' oo boodh u eg.
maay_maay.fractal_modifies_the_iteration_to_z_re: fractal-ku wuxuu celcelinta u beddelaa z = (|Re(z)| + i|Im(z)|)² + c, isagoo abuuraya qaab aan siman oo u eg markab ololaya. Waxaa 1992 helay Michael Michelitsch iyo Otto Rössler.
maay_maay.is_built_by_the_chaos_game_pick_a_rand: waxaa lagu dhisaa 'ciyaarta qasanaanta': dooro bar aan la sii ogayn, ka dibna si joogto ah u bood badhka waddada ilaa gees si aan loo ogayn loo doortay. Wax lala yaabo, habkan aan la sii ogayn wuxuu abuuraa fractal si sax ah iskii ugu eg.
maay_maay.1924_2010_coined_the_word_fractal_from: (1924–2010) ayaa curiyay erayga 'fractal' oo ka yimid Laatiinka 'fractus' (jabay). Wuxuu tusay in xeebaha, buuraha, xididdada dhiigga, iyo suuqyada saamiyada dhammaantood ay leeyihiin joomatari fractal ah —
maay_maay.double_click_to_zoom_in_scroll_wheel_t: 👆 Laba jeer ku dhufo si aad u weyneysid • Giraangirta scroll-ka si aad u weyneysid/u yaraysid
maay_maay.screens_create_gradients_by_mixing: 🌈 Shaashaduhu waxay gradient ku abuuraan isku darka
maay_maay.each_pixel_blends_red_green_and_blue_l: . Pixel kastaa wuxuu isku daraa iftiin guduud, cagaar, iyo buluug oo xoog kala duwan leh. Gradient-ku wuxuu si siman u kala beddelaa qiimayaashaas bannaanka dhexdiisa.
maay_maay.produces_more_perceptually_uniform_gra: waxay soo saartaa gradient indhaha u siman ka badan RGB. Marka laga tago guduud ilaa buluug RGB dhexdiisa, waxaad marataa cawl dhoobo u eg; HSL dhexdiisana waxaad marataa guduud-buluug dhalaalaya — sida rinjiile isku dari lahaa.
maay_maay.are_everywhere_sunsets_rayleigh_scatte: meel walba way ka jiraan: qorrax-dhaca (Rayleigh scattering ayaa kala saara dhererka mowjadaha), qaansoroobaadka (jebinta iftiinku waxay u kala saartaa frequency), iyo qoto-dheerida badda (biyuhu marka hore way nuugaan guduudka, waxaana harta buluug qoto-dheer).
maay_maay.sweep_color_around_a_center_point_like: waxay midabka ku wareejiyaan bar bartame ah sida giraangirta midabka. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa jaantusyada pie, wareegyada sugitaanka, iyo bandhigga xogta. CSS wuxuu taageerada conic-gradient soo daray 2020 keliya!
maay_maay.use_gradients_to_create_depth_direct_a: waxay gradient u isticmaalaan inay abuuraan qoto-dheeri, ay indhaha meel u jiheeyaan, iyo inay dareen kiciyaan. Gradient ka socda kulul ilaa qabow wuxuu muujiyaa qoto-dheeri (atmospheric perspective); mid ka socda iftiin ilaa madow wuxuu muujiyaa mug (chiaroscuro).
maay_maay.describe_an_object_for_a_depth_map_or_: Sharax shay khariidad qoto-dheeri loo sameeyo ama qaab dahaadh loo sameeyo...
maay_maay.generate_ai_pattern_tile: Ku samee Tile Qaab ah AI
maay_maay.generate_ai_base_tile: 🎨 Ku samee Tile Aasaasi ah AI
maay_maay.white_pops_out_gray_middle_black_far: Cad = dibadda u soo baxaya • Cawl = dhexe • Madow = fog
maay_maay.your_eyes_are_6_cm_apart: Indhahaagu waxay kala fog yihiin ~6 cm
maay_maay.so_each_sees_the_world_from_a_slightly: , sidaas darteed mid kastaa wuxuu adduunka ka arkaa xagal yar oo kala duwan. Maskaxdaadu waxay labada aragti isku darsataa si aad u aragtid
maay_maay.magic_eye_images_hide_3d_shapes_in_a_r: (sawirrada Magic Eye™) waxay qaabab 3D ku qariyaan qaab isku celceliya. Tabtu waa: meesha shayga qarsoon uu ku 'dhow yahay,' qaabku wuxuu ku celcelinayaa
maay_maay.where_it_s_far_the_period_is_longer_yo: ; meesha uu ku 'fog yahay,' muddadu way dheer tahay. Maskaxdaadu waxay kala-duwanaanshaha muddooyinkaas u fasirtaa qoto-dheeri.
maay_maay.1993_94_by_tom_baccei_and_cheri_smith_: (1993–94) ee ay qoreen Tom Baccei iyo Cheri Smith waxaa ka iibsaday in ka badan 25 milyan oo koobbi oo adduunka ah. Farsamada autostereogram-ka waxaa hormuud u ahaa Dr. Christopher Tyler 1979.
maay_maay.to_see_the_image_hold_your_face_close_: 🧠 Si aad sawirka u aragtid: wejigaaga shaashadda u soo dhawee, indhahaaga nasi sidii adigoo 'ka shisheeya' sawirka darbi fog u jeedaya, ka dibna si tartiib ah dib ugu noqo. Qaabka 3D-da ayaa soo 'boodaya'. Tan waxaa la yiraahdaa
maay_maay.have_difficulty_seeing_stereograms_due: way ku adag tahay inay stereogram arkaan sababo la xiriira xaalado sida amblyopia (il caajis ah), strabismus (indho leexsan), ama kala-duwanaanshaha aragga laba-isheed. Tani gebi ahaanba waa caadi!
maay_maay.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_i: Indhahaaga nasi oo sawirka 'ka shisheeya' fiiri si aad 3D u aragtid
maay_maay.relax_your_eyes_try_to_look_through_th: Indhahaaga nasi — isku day inaad sawirka 'ka shisheeya' fiirisid darbi ka danbeeya
maay_maay.slowly_move_back_a_3d_shape_will_emerg: Si tartiib ah dib ugu noqo. Qaab 3D ah ayaa soo bixi doona!
maay_maay.tip_the_two_guide_dots_above_should_ap: Talo: labada dhibcood ee koor ku yaal waa inay saddex u muuqdaan marka indhahaagu si sax ah u dhigan yihiin
maay_maay.create_animated_3d_stereograms_from_pr: Ka samee stereogram 3D oo dhaqaaqa qaabab horay loo diyaariyay, sawirro aad gacanta ku sawirtay, sawirro aad soo shubtay, transform, ama khariidado qoto-dheeri oo AI abuuray!
maay_maay.draw_a_depth_map_capture_it_as_a_keyfr: Sawir khariidad qoto-dheeri, u qabo sida keyframe, ka dibna sawir midda xigta. Dhaqdhaqaaqu wuxuu isku xiri doonaa kuwa dhexdooda.
maay_maay.upload_a_grayscale_image_white_near_bl: Soo shub sawir cawlan (cad = dhow, madow = fog). Waxaa lagu dhaqaajin doonaa transform-ka la doortay.
maay_maay.depth_map_loaded_400_400: ✅ Khariidadda qoto-dheerida waa la soo raray (400×400)
maay_maay.animates_the_depth_map_from_the_static: Wuxuu dhaqaajiyaa khariidadda qoto-dheerida ee ka timid tab-ka Taagan isagoo isticmaalaya beddelka la doortay. Marka hore u gudub habka Taagan si aad khariidaddaada u sawirtid.
maay_maay.tip_draw_a_depth_map_in_the_static_tab: 💡 Talo: Marka hore khariidad qoto-dheeri ku sawir tab-ka Taagan, ka dibna halkan ku soo noqo si aad beddel ugu dhaqaajisid.
maay_maay.describe_a_3d_scene_and_ai_will_genera: Sharax muuqaal 3D ah, AI-guna wuxuu abuuri doonaa khariidad qoto-dheeri, ka dibna beddel buu ku dhaqaajin doonaa.
maay_maay.e_g_a_glowing_crystal_orb_floating_in_: tusaale: Kubbad kiristaal ah oo dhalaalaysa oo hawada ku sabbaysa...
maay_maay.generate_ai_depth_map_for_animation: Ku samee Khariidad Qoto-dheeri AI oo dhaqdhaqaaq
maay_maay.ai_depth_map_ready: ✅ Khariidadda qoto-dheerida ee AI way diyaar tahay!
maay_maay.ai_motion_calls_gemini_to_plan_poses_t: Dhaqdhaqaaqa AI wuxuu u yeeraa Gemini si uu u qorsheeyo istaagyada, ka dibna Imagen ayaa frame kasta u soo saara khariidad qoto-dheeri u gaar ah. ~5–7s frame kasta; xadka rate-limit ma dhaafo.
maay_maay.ai_image_generation_is_not_available_u: ⚠️ Abuurista sawirka AI ma jirto. Isticmaal habka Diyaarsan, Sawir, Soo shub, ama Beddel.
maay_maay.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_a: Indhahaaga nasi oo dhaqdhaqaaqa 'ka shisheeya' fiiri si aad u aragtid qaabab 3D oo dhaqaaqaya
maay_maay.lock_your_eyes_into_the_3d_view_before: Indhahaaga ku xir aragga 3D ka hor intaadan Play riixin
maay_maay.slower_speeds_4_6_fps_are_easier_to_ma: Xawliyada gaabis ah (4–6 FPS) way ka fudud yihiin in aragga lagu hayo
maay_maay.pulse_and_heart_presets_are_the_easies: Qaababka Garaac iyo Wadne ayaa ugu fudud in la arko marka ay dhaqaaqayaan
maay_maay.the_exported_gif_can_be_printed_frame_: GIF-ka la soo saaray waa la daabici karaa frame frame sidii buug sawir dhaqaaqaya!
